arts.ttl: Spurs confirmed team vs Frankfurt - Djed Spence benched as Johnson starts
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has named the Tottenham Hotspur team that he believes can overcome Eintracht Frankfurt in their Europa League quarter-final first leg on Thursday night. Here's the team Postecoglou has selected for this Europa League quarter-final clash:

arts.ttl: Spurs player ratings vs Frankfurt - Bergvall shining light again but attack poor
arts.sum: Spurs had a string of chances in the second half with Lucas Bergvall and Rodrigo Bentancur both hitting the crossbar and Son and Maddison forcing the keeper into saves before Micky van de Ven had a late bouncing header tipped over. Frankfurt opened the scoring after just six minutes as Hugo Ekitike struck an excellent low shot into the bottom right corner from outside the box following a break up the pitch after James Maddison was dispossessed in the visitors' half.

Ange on if he was disappointed not to win after our second half display... We stayed in control, we scored a good equaliser, we made them work hard in the first half so we knew in the second half, with our ability to break teams open, we would put them under pressure.

arts.ttl: The football gods have their eyes elsewhere this year – Spurs’ Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham squandered a number of second-half chances, but boss Postecoglou retains belief they can progress.

arts.ttl: Man City keen on Spurs' Udogie - Friday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester City are interested in signing Tottenham's Destiny Udogie and a host of Premier League clubs want Bournemouth's Dean Huijsen.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou’s verdict: “I couldn’t have asked for more”
arts.sum: Speaking on our Review Show, Ange reflected: “I couldn’t ask more from the boys in terms of performance. If we repeat that performance next week, we’ll give ourselves a great chance.

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham now leading the race to sign midfield prodigy who’s been compared to Cole Palmer
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly in pole position to land Southampton youngster Tyler Dibling, as the club looks to revamp its squad ahead of the summer transfer window. Following a season that’s fallen short of expectations, Spurs are keen to inject fresh energy and versatility into their attacking options. arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea considering summer move for Tottenham striker
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly keeping a close watch on Mathys Tel’s situation at Tottenham Hotspur, with the Blues poised to reignite their interest in the French forward should Spurs opt against making his loan move permanent. arts.ttl: Germany's media deliver their Pedro Porro verdict after Tottenham full-back's backheel goal vs Eintracht Frankfurt
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur held Eintracht Frankfurt to a 1-1 draw in their Europa League quarter-final first leg in North London. Spurs fell behind after just six...
